title: dalenia latifolia
intro: Dalenia latifolia, also known as the 'Kali Musli' or 'Black Musli', is a rare, herbaceous plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities. The health benefits of Dalenia latifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant's roots and rhizomes are used to prepare herbal supplements and teas, often in combination with other Ayurvedic herbs.
